description: A thin sheet of otherworldly material etched with crude pictographs.  Upon closer inspection, the pictographs are slowly moving - animated grooves carved into the strange metal.  They show a squat, round vessel with its front opening like a jaw as a faceless humanoid places various objects, including a leaf, a wrench, and a dead animal, inside it.  Above it, three circular eyes sit empty, then begin to radiate jagged lines as a side crank is turned.  The contents of the chamber are reduced to a scribbled, lightning-bolt haze.  In the final image, the humanoid figure stands smaller than before, as the three darkened eyes focus into pupils, chasing the figure's descent.
